dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, we lost good people during {quest_origin}. {quest_stakes} gave their lives defending us, and {quest_threat} are still out there.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I cannot let their sacrifice go unanswered. We need to {quest_action}. {quest_ally} tracked them to an area {location_hint}. Find them and collect {quest_item} from {quest_focus} as proof.
dialogueChunks.outro: Those we lost were family to this settlement. Their memory demands justice.

playerResponses.text: They will pay for every life they took.
Revenge is a dangerous road. But I understand.
The dead are dead. More killing will not bring them back.

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_threat} killed people we cared about, {player_name}. {quest_stakes} were out doing their work when they were taken from us. We found what was left.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The community is grieving and furious. We need to {quest_action} {quest_time_pressure}. {quest_focus} is somewhere {location_hint}. Take {quest_item} to help deal with them.
dialogueChunks.outro: We lay our people to rest soon. I want to tell them it is done.

playerResponses.text: I will make sure no more of your people die to this.
There is no point in revenge.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, during {quest_origin}, {quest_threat} killed {quest_stakes} in cold blood. The victim was kin to half this settlement.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The whole community wants justice. I need you to {quest_action} from {quest_focus}. {quest_ally} says they are holed up {location_hint}. Recover {quest_item} from the scene as evidence.
dialogueChunks.outro: The family deserves closure, and {quest_reward_hint} has been set aside for exactly this purpose.

playerResponses.text: Murder demands an answer. I will find them.
Hunting them in their own territory? Too risky.
